ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_lead" TEXT /* Name of the project lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "station_description" TEXT /* Description of the station */,
  "station_location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, project manager, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the project the sample belongs to */,
  "station_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the station where the sample was collected */,
  "collected_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who collected the sample */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., water, sediment) */,
  "sample_location" TEXT /* Location details for the sample collection */,
  "sample_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sample was collected */,
  "sample_medium" TEXT /* Medium of the sample (e.g., surface water, groundwater) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter being measured (e.g., Bicarbonate, Calcium) */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., mg/l) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "measurement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of measurement (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Data quality flag (e.g., good, questionable, bad) */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., physical, chemical, biological) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the sample the measurement belongs to */,
  "parameter_id" TEXT /* ID of the parameter being measured */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement result */,
  "result_sample_fraction" TEXT /* Fraction of the sample used for the measurement (e.g., Total, Dissolved) */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was recorded */,
  "result_method" TEXT /* Method used to obtain the measurement */,
  "result_lab" TEXT /* Laboratory where the measurement was conducted */,
  "result_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the measurement result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being changed */,
  "record_id" TEXT /* ID of the record being changed */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column being changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Value of the column before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* Value of the column after the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_log_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("username")
)
